name: Study Room
description:
The room is very plain...  This room is illuminated by some glowing
fireballs, the room is not destroyed at all, some chairs are broken...  And
some tables are turned upside down but that is all, the same dust you saw back
there is here...  Some mages, or shadows, gather here studing, they dont seem
aware of your presence.  You can only leave the room by the entrance.
